subcodes.first_line: God willing, may you ever be and continue to be engaged in service to the Self-Sufficient, Most High, and drink from the pure waters of His imperishable Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بخدمت غنی متعال مشغول باشید و از زلال کوثر بیزوالش
subcodes.subjects: @unity of thought and belief, @unity in diversity, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
